subcodes.first_line: The remembrance of God unto all who dwell in the heavens and on earth, through which the spirit of life was breathed into the world. Blessed are they that perceive [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله لمن فی السموات و الارضین به نفخ روح الحیوان فی العالم طوبی للعارفین
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @Manifestation of God as sun, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @suffering and imprisonment, @knowledge; recognition of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
